name: Long Context with compact_20260112 (Sonnet 4.6, Wave 2)
description: Verifies the compact_20260112 context-management strategy, which the live /v1/models capability API confirms is exclusive to Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.7 (Haiku 4.5 returns supported: false). Tests if CC actually sends this strategy or if it only sends clear_tool_uses. Shorter prompt than long-context to isolate the compact vs clear_tool_uses dimension.
prompt: PLACEHOLDER — supplied via --prompt-file at runtime (generator target: ~50K tokens, enough to trigger compaction but not clear_tool_uses)
expectedBehavior: body.context_management.edits[] contains {type: 'compact_20260112'} OR the compact strategy is negotiated via a different mechanism (document which). compact-2026-01-12 beta may be present in anthropic-beta (verify).
